          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport random\n\nfrom mini_celery.backoff import BackoffPolicy\n\n\ndef test_backoff_without_jitter_is_deterministic() -> None:\n    policy = BackoffPolicy(base_delay_sec=1.0, multiplier=2.0, cap_delay_sec=10.0, jitter_ratio=0.0)\n    delays = [policy.compute_delay(attempt=i) for i in range(1, 6)]\n    assert delays == [1.0, 2.0, 4.0, 8.0, 10.0]\n\n\ndef test_backoff_with_jitter_bounds() -> None:\n    rng = random.Random(123)\n    policy = BackoffPolicy(base_delay_sec=2.0, multiplier=2.0, cap_delay_sec=20.0, jitter_ratio=0.2)\n\n    for attempt in range(1, 6):\n        raw = min(policy.cap_delay_sec, policy.base_delay_sec * (policy.multiplier ** (attempt - 1)))\n        low = raw * (1.0 - policy.jitter_ratio)\n        high = raw * (1.0 + policy.jitter_ratio)\n        value = policy.compute_delay(attempt=attempt, rng=rng)\n        assert low <= value <= high\r\n"
        },

        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime, timedelta\n\nfrom fastapi.testclient import TestClient\n\nfrom mini_celery.api.main import create_app\n\n\ndef test_post_jobs_reuses_non_terminal_idempotency_key(database, settings, fake_broker, repo) -> None:\n    app = create_app(settings=settings, db=database, broker=fake_broker)\n\n    run_at = (datetime.now(UTC) + timedelta(minutes=5)).isoformat()\n    payload = {\n        \"type\": \"sleep\",\n        \"payload\": {\"seconds\": 0.1},\n        \"queue\": \"default\",\n        \"idempotency_key\": \"idem-1\",\n        \"run_at\": run_at,\n    }\n\n    with TestClient(app) as client:\n        first = client.post(\"/jobs\", json=payload)\n        second = client.post(\"/jobs\", json=payload)\n\n    assert first.status_code == 200\n    assert second.status_code == 200\n    first_id = first.json()[\"job_id\"]\n    second_id = second.json()[\"job_id\"]\n    assert first_id == second_id\n    assert repo.count_jobs() == 1\r\n"
        },

        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport pytest\n\nfrom mini_celery.models import JobState\nfrom mini_celery.state_machine import InvalidTransition, assert_transition, can_transition\n\n\ndef test_valid_transitions() -> None:\n    assert can_transition(JobState.QUEUED, JobState.RUNNING)\n    assert can_transition(JobState.RUNNING, JobState.SUCCEEDED)\n    assert can_transition(JobState.FAILED, JobState.QUEUED)\n    assert can_transition(JobState.DEAD, JobState.QUEUED)\n\n\ndef test_invalid_transition_raises() -> None:\n    with pytest.raises(InvalidTransition):\n        assert_transition(JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.RUNNING)\n\n    with pytest.raises(InvalidTransition):\n        assert_transition(JobState.CANCELED, JobState.QUEUED)\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "364686bd54d167ebaa9e694a0b756d88ea5c9c561998c7a240d038c0daf396ab",

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\n\nfrom mini_celery.models import IdempotencyLock, IdempotencyStatus, JobState\n\n\ndef test_claim_short_circuits_when_idempotency_already_succeeded(database, repo) -> None:\n    job = repo.create_job(\n        type=\"sleep\",\n        payload={\"seconds\": 0.1},\n        queue=\"default\",\n        max_attempts=3,\n        next_run_at=datetime.now(UTC),\n        idempotency_key=\"idem-success\",\n    )\n\n    with database.session() as session:\n        session.add(\n            IdempotencyLock(\n                key=\"idem-success\",\n                owner_job_id=\"other-job\",\n                status=IdempotencyStatus.SUCCEEDED,\n                result={\"ok\": True},\n            )\n        )\n\n    outcome = repo.claim_for_execution(\n        job_id=job.id,\n        stream_id=\"1-0\",\n        consumer=\"worker-a\",\n        visibility_timeout_sec=30,\n        now=datetime.now(UTC),\n    )\n\n    assert outcome.action == \"ack\"\n    refreshed = repo.get_job(job.id)\n    assert refreshed is not None\n    assert refreshed.state == JobState.SUCCEEDED\n    assert refreshed.result == {\"ok\": True}\r\n"
        },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\n\nimport pytest\n\nfrom mini_celery.broker.redis_streams import RedisStreamsBroker\nfrom mini_celery.db import Database\nfrom mini_celery.models import JobState\nfrom mini_celery.repository import Repository\n\n\\REDACTED\\REDACTED\nasync def test_at_least_once_reclaim_after_worker_crash(integration_settings, redis_client) -> None:\n    db = Database(integration_settings.database_url)\n    db.init()\n    repo = Repository(db.SessionLocal)\n    broker = RedisStreamsBroker(settings=integration_settings, redis_client=redis_client)\n\n    queue = \"default\"\n    await broker.ensure_consumer_group(queue)\n\n    job = repo.create_job(\n        type=\"sleep\",\n        payload={\"seconds\": 0.01},\n        queue=queue,\n        max_attempts=3,\n        next_run_at=datetime.now(UTC),\n        idempotency_key=None,\n    )\n\n    stream_id = await broker.enqueue(\n        queue,\n        {\n            \"job_id\": job.id,\n            \"type\": job.type,\n            \"queue\": queue,\n            \"enqueued_at\": datetime.now(UTC).isoformat(),\n            \"dispatch_token\": \"first\",\n        },\n    )\n    assert repo.mark_enqueued(job.id, stream_id)\n\n    messages = await broker.read_group(queue=queue, consumer=\"worker-crash\", count=1, block_ms=1000)\n    assert messages\n    message_id, fields = messages[0]\n\n    first_claim = repo.claim_for_execution(\n        job_id=fields[\"job_id\"],\n        stream_id=message_id,\n        consumer=\"worker-crash\",\n        visibility_timeout_sec=integration_settings.visibility_timeout_sec,\n        now=datetime.now(UTC),\n    )\n    assert first_claim.action == \"execute\"\n\n    await asyncio.sleep(integration_settings.visibility_timeout_sec + 0.2)\n\n    reclaimed = await broker.claim_stale(\n        queue=queue,\n        consumer=\"worker-recover\",\n        min_idle_ms=integration_settings.visibility_timeout_sec * 1000,\n        count=10,\n    )\n    assert reclaimed\n\n    reclaim_id, reclaim_fields = reclaimed[0]\n    second_claim = repo.claim_for_execution(\n        job_id=reclaim_fields[\"job_id\"],\n        stream_id=reclaim_id,\n        consumer=\"worker-recover\",\n        visibility_timeout_sec=integration_settings.visibility_timeout_sec,\n        now=datetime.now(UTC),\n    )\n    assert second_claim.action == \"execute\"\n\n    final_state = repo.finalize_success(job_id=job.id, result={\"ok\": True}, stream_id=reclaim_id)\n    assert final_state == JobState.SUCCEEDED\n    await broker.ack(queue, reclaim_id)\n\n    refreshed = repo.get_job(job.id)\n    assert refreshed is not None\n    assert refreshed.state == JobState.SUCCEEDED\n    assert refreshed.attempts == 2\r\n"
        },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport logging\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom uuid import UUID, uuid4\n\nfrom fastapi import APIRouter, HTTPException, Query, Request, status\n\nfrom mini_celery.metrics import jobs_enqueued_total\nfrom mini_celery.models import JobState\nfrom mini_celery.repository import Repository\nfrom mini_celery.schemas import (\n    ActionJobResponse,\n    CreateJobRequest,\n    CreateJobResponse,\n    JobEventsListResponse,\n    JobsListResponse,\n    events_to_response,\n    job_to_response,\n    jobs_to_response,\n)\nfrom mini_celery.state_machine import InvalidTransition\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\nrouter = APIRouter()\n\n\ndef _to_utc(dt: datetime) -> datetime:\n    if dt.tzinfo is None:\n        return dt.replace(tzinfo=UTC)\n    return dt.astimezone(UTC)\n\n\ndef _repo(request: Request) -> Repository:\n    return request.app.state.repo\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs\", response_model=CreateJobResponse)\nasync def create_job(request: Request, body: CreateJobRequest) -> CreateJobResponse:\n    repo = _repo(request)\n    broker = request.app.state.broker\n\n    queue = body.queue or request.app.state.settings.default_queue\n    now = datetime.now(UTC)\n\n    if body.idempotency_key:\n        existing = repo.find_non_terminal_by_idempotency_key(body.idempotency_key)\n        if existing:\n            return CreateJobResponse(job_id=UUID(existing.id))\n\n    run_at = _to_utc(body.run_at or now)\n    job = repo.create_job(\n        type=body.type,\n        payload=body.payload,\n        queue=queue,\n        max_attempts=body.max_attempts,\n        next_run_at=run_at,\n        idempotency_key=body.idempotency_key,\n    )\n\n    if run_at <= now:\n        fields = {\n            \"job_id\": job.id,\n            \"type\": job.type,\n            \"queue\": job.queue,\n            \"enqueued_at\": now.isoformat(),\n            \"dispatch_token\": str(uuid4()),\n        }\n        try:\n            stream_id = await broker.enqueue(queue, fields)\n            if repo.mark_enqueued(job.id, stream_id):\n                jobs_enqueued_total.labels(type=job.type, queue=queue).inc()\n        except Exception:\n            logger.exception(\"failed to enqueue immediate job\", extra={\"job_id\": job.id})\n\n    return CreateJobResponse(job_id=UUID(job.id))\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\nasync def get_job(job_id: UUID, request: Request):\n    repo = _repo(request)\n    job = repo.get_job(str(job_id))\n    if job is None:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"job not found\")\n    return job_to_response(job)\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs/{job_id}/cancel\", response_model=ActionJobResponse)\nasync def cancel_job(job_id: UUID, request: Request) -> ActionJobResponse:\n    repo = _repo(request)\n    job = repo.cancel_job(str(job_id))\n    if job is None:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"job not found\")\n    return ActionJobResponse(job=job_to_response(job))\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs/{job_id}/retry\", response_model=ActionJobResponse)\nasync def retry_job(job_id: UUID, request: Request) -> ActionJobResponse:\n    repo = _repo(request)\n    broker = request.app.state.broker\n\n    try:\n        job = repo.retry_job(str(job_id))\n    except KeyError:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"job not found\") from None\n    except InvalidTransition as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_409_CONFLICT, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n\n    now = datetime.now(UTC)\n    fields = {\n        \"job_id\": job.id,\n        \"type\": job.type,\n        \"queue\": job.queue,\n        \"enqueued_at\": now.isoformat(),\n        \"dispatch_token\": str(uuid4()),\n    }\n    stream_id = await broker.enqueue(job.queue, fields)\n    if repo.mark_enqueued(job.id, stream_id):\n        jobs_enqueued_total.labels(type=job.type, queue=job.queue).inc()\n\n    refreshed = repo.get_job(job.id)\n    if refreshed is None:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, detail=\"job disappeared\")\n    return ActionJobResponse(job=job_to_response(refreshed))\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs\", response_model=JobsListResponse)\nasync def list_jobs(\n    request: Request,\n    state: str | None = Query(default=None),\n    type: str | None = Query(default=None),\n    limit: int = Query(default=20, ge=1, le=100),\n    cursor: str | None = Query(default=None),\n) -> JobsListResponse:\n    parsed_state: JobState | None = None\n    if state is not None:\n        try:\n            parsed_state = JobState(state)\n        except ValueError as exc:\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=\"invalid state\") from exc\n\n    page = _repo(request).list_jobs(state=parsed_state, type=type, limit=limit, cursor=cursor)\n    return JobsListResponse(items=jobs_to_response(page.items), next_cursor=page.next_cursor)\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs/{job_id}/events\", response_model=JobEventsListResponse)\nasync def list_job_events(\n    job_id: UUID,\n    request: Request,\n    cursor_ts: datetime | None = Query(default=None),\n    limit: int = Query(default=100, ge=1, le=1000),\n) -> JobEventsListResponse:\n    page = _repo(request).list_job_events(job_id=str(job_id), cursor_ts=cursor_ts, limit=limit)\n    return JobEventsListResponse(items=events_to_response(page.items), next_cursor_ts=page.next_cursor_ts)\r\n"
        },

        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom fastapi import APIRouter, HTTPException, Request, status\n\nrouter = APIRouter()\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/healthz\")\nasync def healthz(request: Request) -> dict[str, str]:\n    db_status = \"ok\"\n    redis_status = \"ok\"\n\n    try:\n        request.app.state.db.check()\n    except Exception:\n        db_status = \"error\"\n\n    try:\n        redis_ok = await request.app.state.broker.ping()\n        if not redis_ok:\n            redis_status = \"error\"\n    except Exception:\n        redis_status = \"error\"\n\n    if db_status != \"ok\" or redis_status != \"ok\":\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=status.HTTP_503_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n            detail={\"status\": \"degraded\", \"db\": db_status, \"redis\": redis_status},\n        )\n\n    return {\"status\": \"ok\", \"db\": db_status, \"redis\": redis_status}\r\n"
        },
